betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Pneumatic Tubes§f

§aInstant item transport using compressed air — a faster alternative to conveyor belts!§f

§bPneumatic Tubes§f send items instantly through a network, unlike slow-moving conveyor belts. They require §bcompressed air§f (minimum 1 PU) to operate, consuming §e50mB§f per operation (200mB/s when busy).

§6Range per Pressure§f:
§b• 1 PU§f: 10m  |  §b• 2 PU§f: 25m  |  §b• 3 PU§f: 100m
§b• 4 PU§f: 250m  |  §b• 5 PU§f: 1000m

§6Features§f:
§b• §e15§f filter slots with whitelist/blacklist per ejecting tube
§b• Recipient order§f: round robin, sorted by distance, or random
§b• Source order§f: first slot, last slot, or random
§b• Redstone§f: configurable — default disables with signal, can be inverted

§6Crafting§f:
§b• Basic§f: 2 copper plates + 1 rubber → 8 tubes
§b• Upgraded§f: 2 welded copper + 1 rubber → 24 tubes

§eTip§f: Use tubes for long-distance transport (hundreds of blocks) and conveyor belts for local sorting. Combine both for optimal factory logistics!
